name: CorpFlowAI — GitHub Heartbeat Checker (TEMPLATE, INACTIVE, SECRET-FREE)

meta.note: Stage 1 template for issue #495. NO CREDENTIALS, NO TOKENS, NO CHAT IDS, NO WEBHOOK SECRETS, NO ENV VALUES. Attach a read-only GitHub credential and set Telegram references inside n8n's own credential/env store before activating (Stage 2, Anton-gated).

parameters.content:
## Heartbeat Checker (Stage 1 template)

**Inactive by design.** Activation is Anton-gated (issue #495 Stage 2).

Before activating, IN n8n ONLY (never in the repo):
1. Attach a **read-only GitHub credential** (least scope: issues + PRs read) to the three GitHub HTTP nodes.
2. Set **TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN** and **TELEGRAM_ALERT_CHAT_ID** in n8n's env/credential store (reuse the existing alert path or a dedicated heartbeat bot — Anton's call).
3. Confirm internal-monitoring only: no customer-facing sends.

Thresholds + alert format: see the runbook.
Silent on success; alert only on error/fatal; dedupe key = kind × target × hour.

nodes.name: Telegram alert (attach token/chat id in n8n)

parameters.content:
## Telegram = references only

`{{ $env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}` and `{{ $env.TELEGRAM_ALERT_CHAT_ID }}` are **references**, resolved from n8n's own env/credential store at runtime.

Never paste the actual token or chat id into this template, the repo, or chat. Reuse the existing alert path or a dedicated heartbeat bot.

main.node: Telegram alert (attach token/chat id in n8n)
